questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Manganese is an important ore for steel production.
questions.reason: Reason (R): It is used as an alloying element in steel production.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: Manganese is indeed used as an alloying element to improve the strength and durability of steel.
